isolation: Isolated computing environment ("their own computer"), underlying isolation technology not specified publicly
name: Runwork Agent Sandbox
notes: Runwork Agent Sandbox is a feature within the Runwork team platform, not a standalone compute API. Public docs do not specify isolation technology, cold start latency, GPU availability, max runtime, idle costs, or wake-on-request behavior.
pricing_model: Monthly subscription with included usage credits; overage billed as additional spend
summary: Runwork Agent Sandbox is a feature within the Runwork AI-team platform that provides isolated computing environments for AI agents running Claude CLI (Codex CLI and Gemini CLI were added later). Agents receive delegated tasks, execute them in isolated environments with access to workspace skills, MCP servers, and integrations, and can resume work by session ID. It is used by teams that want AI agents to perform automated work within the Runwork workspace.
